title: Fox Themed GUI
description: Fox Themed GUI, with fabric and modmenu support.
body:
_Hello there !_

This is my first GUI, made for Java 1.21.

It is minecraft fox themed, so it's pale orange and orange, with a bit of brown and grey. And for sure, there's a little fox head with a sweet berry on some of the containers !

**Fabric and ModMenu are supported.**

_The only thing I couldn't manage to fix is when you have an orange glass panel in your inventory. The slot will be slightly darker, and you'll be able to see it if you've got several orange glass panels (see picture below)._

![orange glass panels on orange slots...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/510a19d701b26dbd931a610ce5e18d391c5d0762.png)



**_Don't forget to check the gallery to see how it looks !_**


Also, I am open to any feedback you would have, so I can improve my work.

Thank you !
